title: Hollow Charms
description: Adds Hollow Knight Charms to Minecraft!
body:
# HOLLOW CHARMS
Hollow Knight charms came to Minecraft!

**REQUIRES CURIOS API**

Number of charms added: **20** (1.21.1) **18** (1.20.1)

_Most_ recipies can be found in the recipe book after obtaining a broken charm!

Adds multiple helpful charms to aid in combat or exploration

## Dying Wish ![dying wish](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11d1a14c25261d19d8cc19a3ace984d0cd61c99a.png)
Chance to drop from the death of any mob.

## Void ![void](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b080558a13032d497a28b715a60e8eefaa9f47e9.png)
Obtained from the Warden.

## Strong Shell ![strong shell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37520f01d15f0662d1b958b8383a30affcf03787.png)
Obtained from Guardians.

## Left Kingsoul ![left kingsoul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe7fc0c113f133fdad56c160d9baca22b0aea0c0.png)
Obtained from the Ender Dragon.

## Right Kingsoul ![right kingsoul](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a2ac32922eede4377c4678fc5bc1f94a522cc18.png)
Obtained from the Wither.

## Ravager Claw (1.21.1)
Obtained from Ravagers.

## Grubs ![dead grub](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e495017ef01b306afd8f8d11abb76dc54e4dca3.png)
Randomly spawn in the Overworld.
